CE1.justification: Answered directly with a prioritized read; no questions, no orientation demands on the user.

CE2.justification: Tightest of the five — single paragraph, no preamble, ends with one concrete offer; no filler.

CE3.justification: The daybook write appears only in actions; the user-facing response doesn't mention where the triage was logged.

CE4.justification: Single committed daybook entry, no orphan artifacts mid-flow.
